title: Myoxanthus pastacensis
taxonomy: Myoxanthus pastacensis is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. The genus Myoxanthus is a group of orchids that are native to Central and South America. Myoxanthus pastacensis is classified as an epiphytic orchid, meaning it grows on other plants or surfaces. The plant's classification also reflects its membership in the subtribe Pleurothallidinae, a group of orchids known for their unique flowers and growth habits. Further classification details include the order Asparagales and the kingdom Plantae.
